purpose: Tavily live founder-sourcing capture for deterministic demo replay (displaces GitHub R7 scan per commit 4062322; prize track 'Best Use of Tavily'). The demo replays these captures; no live Tavily call on stage.
referenceTimeNote: Fixed 'now' anchor for the Tavily source. Deterministic scoring computes relevance against these fixed captures (NOT a live call), so reruns reproduce an identical ranking — same contract as data/replay/scan/metadata.json.

engine.keyStatus: live — verified with a real search that returned results (request_id 9e43b561-6e41-4ab6-a70f-fd9249e52ee7)
engine.creditNote: 6 live searches total this session (q1 basic verify + q2/q3/q4 advanced). Tavily bills 1 API credit per basic search and 2 per advanced search; captured 4, so ~7 credits consumed. Finite free-tier credits — do not re-run for demo; replay from raw/ instead.

thesis: AI infra, developer tools, agents — surface pre-fundraise founders and early-stage signals via live web search (Tavily), complementing the GitHub repo scan.

queries.query: AI infrastructure open source startup pre-seed 2026 GitHub

provenance: Raw captures are the verbatim tavily_search JSON responses (query, results[].url/title/content/score, response_time, request_id) with no post-processing. Honest note: results are web-article/directory hits, not a structured founder table — the scoring layer extracts founder/company signals from results[].content.
